working_on: PDG papers extraction Session δ₂ — tool-stack ADR + learning-outcome taxonomy ADR + Q1/Q2/Q3 + D6 (+ time-permitting D8) adjudications
declared_scope: Land product/adr/0095 (tool-stack: Postgres+JSONB confirmed; OSS Apache-2.0 + cost-priced posture raises revisit bar; amends ADR 0017) + product/adr/0096 (learning-outcome taxonomy: 3-level depth + Decoding-the-Disciplines bottleneck moves), each carrying ADR 0084 extraction-step Load-bearing premises subsection + paired engine_memory decisions drawer. Adjudicate Q1 (node_type multi-valued, concept-level — settles D1+D2), Q2 (individual-only shipped binary; OSS forks not foreclosed), Q3 (per-cluster BYOK execution-surface table), D6 (misconception → concept-node; closes ADR 0094 T1-B); time-permitting D8 (open-for-revision enums). Defer D3/D4/D5/D7 to Cluster 4/5 cluster-implementation ADR authors. phase: NA-PDG-pre-phase
outcome_summary: PDG Session δ₂ delivered the full slate per the approved plan. ADR 0095 (decisions drawer 20ecbf7a6e884f4aba5a21d1c3d410bf paired) lands the Phase 6 tool-stack settlement: Postgres+JSONB+recursive CTEs confirmed for Tier-A and beyond; OSS Apache 2.0 + cost-priced posture per ADRs 0065 + 0093 (from S-0128 + per S-0202 respectively) raises the revisit bar to a four-criterion conjunction (demonstrated unfixable Postgres failure + Apache 2.0-compatible alternative + maintainer-cost-neutral + amortizable migration cost); forecloses Neo4j Enterprise/Community + Memgraph BSL + cloud graph DBs + RDF triplestores; admits Apache AGE as only credible Postgres-internal revisit target; amends ADR 0017 in-body (Status stays Accepted on 0017). The framing rests on user pushback at ExitPlanMode rejection captured per pushback drawer 29c4a3794cdf4d778fb1f2a411a11d21 — without that pushback the plan's softer 'named trigger criterion' framing would have landed instead. The amend-with-elevated-bar pattern is generalized per lesson drawer 0be1206953a747e7860e074785c5f9aa. ADR 0096 (decisions drawer 1ceb8ba01bcf463db708a456de6f80f1) lands the learning-outcome taxonomy: 3-level depth (introductory / analytical / comparative-research) + Decoding-the-Disciplines bottleneck moves as (depth_level, bottleneck_move) tuple. Five Q/D adjudications appended to HANDOFF.md PDG section with paired decisions drawers: Q1+D1+D2 (drawer 6a55cc2ac44a41c9be569f5cf7a043ce — node_type multi-valued + concept-level per ADR 0008); Q2 (drawer e464bf2da6bd4e019c56292cd8d1f6e7 — individual-only shipped binary + OSS forks not foreclosed); Q3 (drawer 37ef16131b574eba9c2eb1a6504518ca — per-cluster BYOK execution-surface table); D6 (drawer ddca2a47d9e148868a5cfb4bfe77d753 — misconception → concept-node; closes ADR 0094 T1-B verified per S-0202's premise 3 disposition); D8 (drawer b3b4e9d197e0472cbe9c9f295f74c343 — per-layer enums open-for-revision via in-body amendment). All four Session δ foundational ADRs (0093 + 0094 at S-0202; 0095 + 0096 at S-0203) now landed. Bounded housekeeping rode along: stale ENGINE_LOG.md pointers in product/adr/README.md + engine/adr/README.md updated to engine/changelog/<YYYY>/ per ADR 0092 (the noticed-but-deferred item from S-0202's diary). ADR count 94 → 96. Remaining D3/D4/D5/D7 defer to Cluster 4/5 cluster-implementation ADR authors per work-item ownership transfer (D7 to same Cluster 5 ADR as D6). Next session work item is the first Tier-A cluster-implementation ADR (likely Cluster 1 Contestability substrate per ADR 0094 dependency order C1 → C2 → C4 → C3 → C5); S-0204 is also the cadence-trigger slot for the next health-check audit (user adjudicates audit-now vs Cluster 1 ADR at S-0204 boot).

scope_delivery.explanation: Yes — full declared scope landed: ADR 0095 + ADR 0096 + Q1+D1+D2 + Q2 + Q3 + D6 + D8 (D8 was the time-permitting item; landed). D3/D4/D5/D7 deferred to Cluster 4/5 cluster-implementation ADR authors per the work-item-ownership-transfer pattern named in the declared scope (not a descope). User pushback at ExitPlanMode rejection reshaped ADR 0095's framing (named trigger criterion → four-criterion bar foreclosure) mid-plan, but this was caught before slot claim — scope itself unchanged. Bounded housekeeping (stale ENGINE_LOG.md pointers) rode along per feedback_housekeeping_rides_along memory; not a user-confirmed change.

side_discoveries.reasoning: Phrase 'first known-pending revision (likely bottleneck per F3...)' is descriptive prose about D8 settlement's first-revision-discipline (the known pending revision is a normal Cluster 4 ADR amendment per foundations.md §7.3 recommendation 2). Not a defer; not a TODO; it's the settlement's content.

Phrase 'Misconception-flagged concept' uses 'flagged' as 'marked with a flag' (the misconception flag on the concept node via Cluster 4 multi-valued node_type), not 'flagged for follow-up'. Descriptive prose, not a defer.
Phrase 'web visualizer deferred to Phase 8/9 per same commitment' references ADR 0093 commitment 3's existing deferral that's already tracked there. Not a new defer introduced in this session.

Phrase 'S-0202 diary noticed-but-deferred item' refers to the prior session's noticed-but-deferred ENGINE_LOG.md stale-pointer item; addressed inline IN THIS commit (rode along per feedback_housekeeping_rides_along memory). Both product/adr/README.md and engine/adr/README.md updated to engine/changelog/<YYYY>/ per ADR 0092.
